rationale: The cited paper appears as part of a grouped citation in the introduction to support a broad claim that managers invest in influencing and understanding WOM patterns. The citing article does not discuss Libai et al. (2013)'s acceleration-versus-expansion framework, seeding valuation logic, model, or findings in its conceptual development, hypotheses, methods, or results interpretation. This indicates a passing background reference rather than a paper-specific functional dependence.
